title: Get VO2 Max Summary by Interval
description:
This endpoint returns the Cardio Fitness Score (also know as VO2 Max) data for a date range. VO2 Max values will be shown as a range if no run data is available or a single numeric value if the user uses a GPS for runs. See Additional Information for further context.

The endpoint response ignores the Units header. The value returned is always in ml/kg/min.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: start-date
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today.

parameters.name: end-date
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today. Maximum range: 30 days

response_fields.name: cardioscore : dateTime
response_fields.description: The date specified in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

response_fields.name: cardioscore : value : vo2Max
response_fields.description: The displayable value of VO2 Max in mL/kg/min.
